intent: Unified API with alephant session headers should still process successfully
curl: curl -X POST "$GATEWAY_BASE/v1/chat/completions" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ALEPHANT_CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY" -H "Alephant-Session-Id: s-template-001" -H "Alephant-Session-Path: flow/main" -H "Alephant-Session-Name: e2e-template" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"openai/gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"session-headers-template"}],"max_tokens":8}'
